notes: Iteration-2: isolated discriminating fixtures (each fires ONE target check) + 5 negative/edge cases + hook eval парсит permissionDecisionReason для извлечения check codes (не только substring). Forbidden_codes теперь strictly enforces score=0. All evals use git_init_empty to suppress CODE_DRIFT_SKIPPED noise. iteration-1 → iteration-2 diff: 14 evals → 18 evals; разрешение поднято: positive fixtures фейлят при non-target code; hook eval показывает codes из reason а не [] как раньше.

breakdown_verify: total count matches expected_total (always 1pt if not specified)
warning count matches expected_warning or >= expected_warning_min
info count matches expected_info or >= expected_info_min
all expected_codes present in actual codes

evals.name: v2-fc-create-exists-isolated
evals.prompt: Isolated fc-create-only fixture + pre-created EXISTING_FILE_v2.txt + git init empty. Expect EXACTLY 1 ERROR FC_CREATE_EXISTS, 0 WARNING, 0 INFO, total=1.

evals.name: v2-fc-edit-missing-isolated
evals.prompt: Isolated fc-edit-only fixture + git init empty. Expect EXACTLY 1 ERROR FC_EDIT_MISSING, total=1.

evals.name: v2-fc-delete-missing-isolated
evals.prompt: Isolated fc-delete-only fixture + git init empty. Expect EXACTLY 1 ERROR FC_DELETE_MISSING, total=1.

evals.name: v2-narrative-path-missing-isolated
evals.prompt: Isolated narrative-only fixture (FR.md inline backtick on missing path; FC create row on non-existing → no FC error) + git init empty. Expect EXACTLY 1 WARNING NARRATIVE_PATH_MISSING, total=1.

evals.name: v2-narrative-fenced-code-skip-NEGATIVE
evals.prompt: NEGATIVE TEST — narrative-fenced-skip fixture has missing path INSIDE fenced ``` block. Skill must NOT fire NARRATIVE_PATH_MISSING for fenced code paths.

evals.name: v2-code-drift-only-isolated
evals.prompt: Isolated code-drift-only fixture + git init + commit src/feature_v2.ts mentioning FR-1. File exists → no FC_EDIT_MISSING. Expect EXACTLY 1 WARNING CODE_DRIFT_FR_ALREADY_DONE, total=1.

evals.name: v2-code-drift-skipped-no-git-NEGATIVE
evals.prompt: NEGATIVE — code-drift-only fixture WITHOUT git init. Expect CODE_DRIFT_SKIPPED INFO + FC_EDIT_MISSING ERROR (file not pre-created). Must NOT fire CODE_DRIFT_FR_ALREADY_DONE.

evals.name: v2-tasks-fc-orphan-isolated
evals.prompt: Isolated tasks-fc-only fixture: TASKS has src/main_v2.ts + src/orphan_v2.ts; FC has only src/main_v2.ts. Pre-create both files. Expect EXACTLY 1 WARNING TASKS_FC_CONSISTENCY (orphan TASK), total=1.

evals.name: v2-clean-baseline-zero-findings
evals.prompt: Clean-baseline fixture: all paths exist (pre-created), no FR-N, TASKS+FC aligned, git init empty. Expect EXACTLY 0 findings.

evals.name: v2-fc-malformed-parser-graceful-NEGATIVE
evals.prompt: NEGATIVE — malformed FC table (no Path column). Parser MUST emit FC_PARSE_UNPARSEABLE INFO and not crash; must NOT emit FC_*_MISSING/EXISTS spuriously.

evals.name: v2-fc-edit-on-existing-NO-create-error-NEGATIVE
evals.prompt: NEGATIVE — action=edit on EXISTING file MUST NOT emit FC_CREATE_EXISTS (only action=create on existing should). Happy path with 0 findings.

evals.name: v2-fc-empty-table-graceful-NEGATIVE
evals.prompt: NEGATIVE — empty FC table (header + separator only). Parser MUST emit FC_EMPTY INFO and not crash; must NOT emit FC_*_MISSING/EXISTS.

evals.name: v2-format-json-valid-output
evals.prompt: Run verify --format json on fc-edit-only. Expect valid JSON with shape {findings:[], summary:{total, by_severity, by_check}}, isolated to FC_EDIT_MISSING.

evals.name: v2-format-human-readable-output
evals.prompt: Spawn verify --format human on fc-edit-only. Expect 'Reality check:' header + 'FC_EDIT_MISSING' string in stdout.

evals.name: v2-format-markdown-valid-table
evals.prompt: Spawn verify --format markdown on fc-edit-only. Expect markdown table header and FC_EDIT_MISSING row.

evals.name: v2-baseline-pinned-shipped-clean-spec
evals.prompt: Pinned baseline — real .specs/spec-workflow-md-validation/. ERROR must remain 0 (regression invariant). Codes set captured from iteration-1.

evals.name: v2-baseline-pinned-spec-reality-check-self
evals.prompt: Pinned baseline — .specs/spec-reality-check/ (own spec). After 2026-05-24 self-cleanup of stale `action=create` rows for shipped files (FILE_CHANGES.md commented HTML block). ERROR must remain 0; warning code set should be NARRATIVE/CODE_DRIFT/TASKS_FC — any new FC ERR = regression in skill OR uncleaned new create rows.

evals.name: v2-baseline-pinned-canonical-plugin-post-cleanup
evals.prompt: Pinned baseline — .specs/dev-pomogator-canonical-plugin/ after 2026-05-24 cleanup. ERROR must remain 0; warning code set frozen — any new FC_*_MISSING ERROR = regression.

evals.name: v2-hook-deny-with-code-parse
evals.prompt: Hook receives ExitPlanMode plan referencing missing-edit fixture. Must DENY with FC_EDIT_MISSING + FC_DELETE_MISSING codes embedded in reason (extracted via regex). Must NOT contain FC_CREATE_EXISTS.

evals.name: v2-hook-permit-on-clean-plan
evals.prompt: Hook receives plan with no spec refs. Must permit (empty stdout).

tool_input.plan: Generic plan with no spec references.

evals.name: v2-hook-failopen-on-invalid-stdin
evals.prompt: Hook receives malformed stdin. Must fail-open (exit 0 + empty stdout).

evals.name: v2-tasks-inline-paths-recognized
evals.prompt: Bug 13 caught: TASKS.md уmempion-ит file paths inline в backticks (a-la GitHub issue checkbox style), не only в `**files:**` блоках. extractTaskPaths видел только `**files:**` → 113 false INFO orphan-FC на spec-generator-v4. Fix: also extract inline backtick paths with file extensions from TASKS.md. Eval: TASKS mentions `src/inline_task_v2.ts` inline; FC has same path; consistency check should match → 0 TASKS_FC_CONSISTENCY findings for that pair.

evals.name: v2-narrative-planned-create-reconciled
evals.prompt: Bug 12 caught: spec narrative referenced files it ALSO planned in FC (action=create) — narrative WARN-ed 'missing' creating duplicate signal. Now narrative check receives plannedCreatePaths set and skips refs already covered by FC plan. Real-world hit: worktree-setup spec had 18 NARRATIVE WARN for its own planned skill files; dropped to 2 after fix.

evals.name: v2-narrative-runtime-paths-skip-NEGATIVE
evals.prompt: Bug 10 caught: runtime paths (~/, $VAR, %VAR%, /etc/, C:\) in narrative backticks fired false NARRATIVE_PATH_MISSING. Real-world hit: pomogator-doctor spec emitted false WARNING on `~/.dev-pomogator/config.json` and `~/.claude/mcp.json` (runtime user-home artifacts, not repo files).

evals.name: v2-fc-non-standard-actions-FC_ACTION_UNCHECKED
evals.prompt: Bug 7 caught: actions rename/reuse/preserve/create+edit silently ignored by parser (parser only checked create/edit/delete; other actions fell through with no finding). Now all non-{create,edit,delete} actions emit FC_ACTION_UNCHECKED INFO so user knows row was parsed but drift not verified. Real-world hit: skills-rules-optimizer (rename rows), and reuse/preserve/create+edit found in corpus scan.

evals.name: v2-fc-glob-paths-skip-NEGATIVE
evals.prompt: NEGATIVE — FC rows with glob patterns (*, **, ?) MUST emit FC_GLOB_PATTERN INFO (3 rows), MUST NOT emit FC_*_MISSING. Caught real bug in codex-cli-support: `extensions/*/extension.json` was FC_EDIT_MISSING false positive.

evals.name: v2-fc-cyrillic-header-recognized
evals.prompt: Spec with Cyrillic header `Файл | Действие | Описание` — parser must recognize Path/Action columns. Expect 1 ERROR FC_EDIT_MISSING (file genuinely missing). Caught real bug: spec-workflow-feature-steps-validation had 27 false FC_PARSE_UNPARSEABLE because header was `Файл`.

evals.name: v2-narrative-glob-skip-NEGATIVE
evals.prompt: NEGATIVE — narrative refs in backticks that are glob patterns (`steps/**/*.ts`) MUST NOT fire NARRATIVE_PATH_MISSING. Caught real bug in spec-workflow-feature-steps-validation FR.md.

evals.name: v2-fc-placeholder-paths-skip-NEGATIVE
evals.prompt: NEGATIVE — FC rows with placeholder paths {x}/<x>/TBD MUST emit FC_PLACEHOLDER_PATH INFO (3 rows), MUST NOT emit FC_*_MISSING/EXISTS. Caught real bug: claim-sanity-check, codex-cli-support, others were false-positive ERROR-ing on unfilled scaffold rows.

evals.name: v2-hook-deny-multi-spec-deduped
evals.prompt: Hook plan referencing same spec 3× should appear once in reason (Set dedup). Plan referencing 2 distinct dirty specs should produce findings from both. Manually verified via /tmp/srcheck-hook test — both behaviors confirmed.

tool_input.plan: first work in .specs/fc-edit-only/ then more in .specs/fc-edit-only/ and finally .specs/fc-edit-only/ — same spec 3x

evals.name: v2-hook-permit-on-clean-spec-reference
evals.prompt: Hook receives plan referencing clean-baseline fixture (0 findings expected). Must permit despite spec being referenced (no ERRORs to deny on).
